hero.description: I build web apps, robust systems, and efficient digital tools with a focus on reliability, performance, and clean code.

about.title: About Me
about.intro: I'm Jhonatan, a software developer and Systems Engineering student at the Universidad Nacional de San Agustín (UNSA) in Arequipa. I specialize in turning complex ideas into intuitive, fast, and scalable digital experiences.
about.body: My technical focus is complemented by a strong interest in UI/UX design, ensuring every application not only has impeccable code but also feels great to use.

education.title: Journey
education.subtitle: My professional path, academic achievements, and collaborative experience.

contact.title: Let's Work
contact.body: I'm currently open to new roles and freelance projects. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll do my best to reply soon.

form.thanks: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you soon.
